{"text":"William Todd"},{"text":" Perhaps I'm lucky but I haven't encountered a single Windows program that isn't supported by Windows 10."},{"text":"\n"},{"text":"\n"},{"text":"It was my assumption that if it works on previous versions of windows XP/7/8/8.1 then it works on Win10. {"text":"Maybe I'm a Microsoft fanboy, but it erks me that Leo discourages upgrading. When you upgrade to windows 10 it authenticates your windows key for the final version of windows.
